metadata.title: Nicolás Corbal — Design Engineer
metadata.description: Design Engineer. I build digital products where design and code meet.

hero.subtitle: Design Engineer — I build digital products where design and code meet.

projects.professionalSubtitle: Projects where I <highlight>collaborated</highlight> with teams and clients.
projects.personalSubtitle: Experiments and personal projects where I <highlight>explore ideas</highlight>.

about.title: About
about.headline: Design Engineer at <company>OSIX</company>. I build products where design and code meet.

story.p1: I've always been drawn to this world. From tinkering with computers as a kid to building digital products today. In <year>2022</year> I started Computer Engineering at USC, and three years later co-founded <company>OSIX</company> with six classmates.
story.p2: OSIX is a development company where we do it all: websites, apps, technical consulting... whatever the client needs. My role is <role>frontend and product design</role>. I've been doing this full-time for 6 months, and the goal is clear: grow the company.
story.p3: I'm inspired by creative studios that care about every detail — Basement, Studiofreight, Active Theory. That level of <craft>craft</craft> is what I pursue. I'm detail-oriented, an experimenter, and I love working in teams. I learn fast and adapt to any stack.

contact.title: Contact
contact.headline: Have a project in mind?
contact.description: I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations. If you have an idea or project, don't hesitate to reach out.
